The '''Hiromi Empire''' was the governmental body of the [[Hiromi]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. In existence for at least two thousand years, it became a member of the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], during the [[Nagai–Tof War]].
